question: Produce an exhaustive, multi-hour deep-research report covering the entire Stellar DeFi landscape end to end.

golden.answer: I can produce a **bounded, dated landscape map**, not honestly promise an exhaustive multi-hour report in one response. Define the source universe and selection criteria, separate lending, liquidity/DEX roles, oracles, bridges, vaults, RWA products, and infrastructure, and attach operator/status/as-of evidence to every named project. Distinguish directory discovery from current deployment and offer staged slices or follow-ups. Use available free read-only research where useful; do not advertise hidden operations, invent completeness, or require one permanent protocol roster.
keyFacts: Provides a useful dated category map with source coverage, lifecycle/status caveats, and a staged path rather than fake exhaustiveness.
avoid: Do NOT invent a $10/5-minute cap, advertise route diagnostics/hidden operations, ban external verification tools as gateway capabilities, or force a frozen DeFi roster.
golden.notes:
GT-22 2026-07-10: grade dated category coverage, source universe, deployment/status precision, non-exhaustiveness, and staged scope. Free research is allowed; hidden operations, route diagnostics, invented caps, and a frozen roster are not gates.
GT-22 CORRECTION 2026-07-10: bounded useful research replaces obsolete banned-tier/internal-route mechanics.

corroboration.claim: Exposed free sources support a dated category map but not end-to-end ecosystem completeness; paid/account operations are absent and external maintainer research tools are not Raven runtime operations.

evidence.ref: B/C: exposure source and live manifest/catalog

rootCause: Non-exhaustiveness discipline was encoded as a blanket research ban with obsolete internal mechanics and a static example roster.
